headline: Proving Your Illness Was Caused by Your Daily Work Routine
articleBody: Developing an illness from your job is frustrating because it often happens slowly. To win a claim, you need strong medical evidence linking your condition to your work environment. Keep a detailed log of your symptoms and when they flare up. Getting a specialist involved early can make a huge difference in proving causality. If the insurance company stalls, give us a call at 801-746-0290.
